page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.10xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 40 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 3.1 GHz. The instance is configured with 96.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.4 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on external network storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for most compute and memory operations. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core Geekbench score of 1284.0 and a multi-core score of 11735.0, supported by AVX-512 vector extensions. Notably, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performance is strong, reaching 161.64 GB/sec, which falls into the top 25% of tested systems. Memory read bandwidth peaks at 2132.58 GB/sec for cached small blocks, while uncached large block reads operate at 105.52 GB/sec.

From a resource density perspective, the instance offers a high concentration of dedicated compute cores relative to its memory capacity. This makes it a cost-efficient choice for CPU-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. The absence of bundled storage and GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, focusing the hardware profile strictly on raw CPU execution. Appropriate workloads include multi-threaded data decompression, web serving, software compilation, and moderate-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.10xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 40 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture with the KVM hypervisor, it provides 96.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a 2.4 GB per core allocation. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators but delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show average single-core and multi-core capabilities, with a notable strength in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 161.64 GB/sec. This hardware profile is highly suited for compute-intensive tasks such as software compilation, web serving, and multi-threaded data processing where dedicated CPU resources are prioritized over large memory capacities or local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.10xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 40 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 96 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for CPU-heavy workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized instance featuring forty dedicated high-frequency processor cores for intensive multi-threaded workloads and parallel processing tasks.
bullet_points: 40 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores clocked at 3.1 GHz
96.0 GB of system memory providing 2.4 GB per core
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong multi-threaded decompression performance reaching 161.64 GB/sec
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for software compilation, web serving, and parallel CPU workloads
